benefits.description: 250-500mcg PT141 sufficient for significant libido boost; ready for rounds 2 and 3 same night; still horny the next day; refractory period significantly reduced; sensitivity increased
Increased flaccid hang and fullness noted as confidence boost
MT2 produced strong tan that lasted at least 2 months; still noticeably darker 4 months out

side_effects.description: Bad nausea over 0.5mg PT141, resolved after some time
MT2 caused vitiligo patches to become more visible (POP); new patches discovered in areas that never get sun; new freckles and moles appeared, existing ones darkened

protocol_notes: PT141 effective at 250-500mcg without excessive side effects. MT2 used at 150-250mcg with comparable libido effects to PT141. MT2 experiment intended to test repigmentation of vitiligo — did not help repigmentation. Vitiligo practically back to normal 4 months after stopping MT2. Recommends watching for new/darkened freckles and moles on MT2.
